description: §6.13.1 valid debounced decl (codes-neg) — `<searchTerm debounced=300ms> = ""` on a plain Shape-1 cell is LEGAL (§6.13.4): none of the §6.13 conflict diagnostics fire. The cell is used (set handler + interpolation) so no orphan-DG noise. NOTE: the debounced-WRITE runtime (trailing/coalesced commit) is NOT asserted here — it is blocked by the open bug G-DEBOUNCE-THROTTLE-TRAILING-NO-COMMIT (see NOTES.md); the throttle LEADING-edge runtime is covered by reactive/throttle-leading.
rationale: §6.13.4 composition table: Shape 1 (`<x debounced=300ms> = ""`) is legal — writes are wrapped per §6.13.1. No E-DEBOUNCED-* / E-REACTIVITY-ATTR-CONFLICT fires.
